languages.text: По следам становится понятно, что когда-то давно здесь ксеносы сражались тут между собой. Отрадно понимать, что и чужаки могут уничтожать друг друга, облегчая долг Человечества.
languages.translation_comment: Если нашел три улики и прокинул чек Логики; говорящий — сам РТ.

languages.text: The traces reveal that, once long ago, xenos fought among themselves here. The heart sings at the knowledge that the inhumans are capable of destroying each other, lessening Humanity's burden.
languages.original_text: По следам становится понятно, что когда-то давно здесь ксеносы сражались тут между собой. Отрадно понимать, что и чужаки могут уничтожать друг друга, облегчая долг Человечества.

traits.locale_text: The traces reveal that, once long ago, xenos fought among themselves here. The heart sings at the knowledge that the inhumans are capable of destroying each other, lessening Humanity's burden.
The traces reveal that, once long ago, xenos fought among themselves here. The heart sings at the knowledge that the inhumans are capable of destroying each other, lessening Humanity's burden.
The traces reveal that, once long ago, xenos fought among themselves here. The heart sings at the knowledge that the inhumans are capable of destroying each other, lessening Humanity's burden.

languages.text: この遺跡は、かつて異種族が争った場所であることを示している。異種族が互いに破壊し合うことができるという事実を知り、人類の負担が軽減されることを心から喜ぶ。
languages.original_text: The traces reveal that, once long ago, xenos fought among themselves here. The heart sings at the knowledge that the inhumans are capable of destroying each other, lessening Humanity's burden.

traits.locale_text: この遺跡は、かつて異種族が争った場所であることを示している。異種族が互いに破壊し合うことができるという事実を知り、人類の負担が軽減されることを心から喜ぶ。

languages.text: İzler, uzun zaman önce burada zenoların kendi aralarında savaştığını ortaya koyuyor. İnsanlık dışı varlıkların birbirlerini yok edebildiğini ve İnsanlığın yükünü hafiflettiğini bilmek, kalbi şenlendiriyor.
languages.original_text: The traces reveal that, once long ago, xenos fought among themselves here. The heart sings at the knowledge that the inhumans are capable of destroying each other, lessening Humanity's burden.

traits.locale_text: İzler, uzun zaman önce burada zenoların kendi aralarında savaştığını ortaya koyuyor. İnsanlık dışı varlıkların birbirlerini yok edebildiğini ve İnsanlığın yükünü hafiflettiğini bilmek, kalbi şenlendiriyor.

languages.text: Todos los indicios apuntan a que, hace mucho tiempo, varios xenos lucharon entre sí en este lugar. Te llena de alegría constatar que los inhumanos son capaces de destruirse mutuamente, reduciendo así el peligro que suponen para la Humanidad.
languages.original_text: The traces reveal that, once long ago, xenos fought among themselves here. The heart sings at the knowledge that the inhumans are capable of destroying each other, lessening Humanity's burden.

traits.locale_text: Todos los indicios apuntan a que, hace mucho tiempo, varios xenos lucharon entre sí en este lugar. Te llena de alegría constatar que los inhumanos son capaces de destruirse mutuamente, reduciendo así el peligro que suponen para la Humanidad.

languages.text: 痕迹表明，在遥远的过去，曾有异形在此自相残杀。得知这些非人生物也会彼此戕害，你身心不禁为之一振——这无疑减轻了人类的负担。
languages.original_text: The traces reveal that, once long ago, xenos fought among themselves here. The heart sings at the knowledge that the inhumans are capable of destroying each other, lessening Humanity's burden.

traits.locale_text: 痕迹表明，在遥远的过去，曾有异形在此自相残杀。得知这些非人生物也会彼此戕害，你身心不禁为之一振——这无疑减轻了人类的负担。

languages.text: Les traces révèlent que ces lieux ont été le théâtre de combats entre xénos, il y a fort longtemps de cela. Votre cœur chante à l'idée que les non-humains soient capables de s'entretuer, allégeant ainsi le fardeau sacré de l'humanité.
languages.original_text: The traces reveal that, once long ago, xenos fought among themselves here. The heart sings at the knowledge that the inhumans are capable of destroying each other, lessening Humanity's burden.

traits.locale_text: Les traces révèlent que ces lieux ont été le théâtre de combats entre xénos, il y a fort longtemps de cela. Votre cœur chante à l'idée que les non-humains soient capables de s'entretuer, allégeant ainsi le fardeau sacré de l'humanité.

languages.text: Die Spuren lassen vermuten, dass hier vor langer Zeit Xenos gegeneinander kämpften. Das Herz jubelt angesichts der Erkenntnis, dass die Unmenschen sich gegenseitig zerstören können und damit die Bürde der Menschheit erleichtern.
languages.original_text: The traces reveal that, once long ago, xenos fought among themselves here. The heart sings at the knowledge that the inhumans are capable of destroying each other, lessening Humanity's burden.

traits.locale_text: Die Spuren lassen vermuten, dass hier vor langer Zeit Xenos gegeneinander kämpften. Das Herz jubelt angesichts der Erkenntnis, dass die Unmenschen sich gegenseitig zerstören können und damit die Bürde der Menschheit erleichtern.
